data.description: Discover all of Mosaic's powerful features: AI agents, timeline editor, A/B testing, batch processing, and more. Everything you need for professional video editing.
data.html:
EnterpriseAPIAgentBeta
Get Started

Features

Tiles. Canvas. Chat. Accelerate.

Tiles

Tile by tile, craft your Mosaic. Each tile represents a video editing operation and is configurable, so you can specify desired outputs. Tiles can be strung together to create agents in the Canvas. These edits can also be prompted directly to the Chat.

Canvas

Drag and drop tiles in a visual canvas to automate your editing workflows. Use pre-built template agents for common use cases, or create your own. Build once, use forever.

1 Video, 10 Variants

Generate different versions of your content simultaneously. Compare and choose the best ones for your audience.

Run in Parallel

Execute multiple branches of your agent's workflow in parallel. Take it a step further by running multiple agents in parallel.

Instant Preview

See the result of every edit in real-time with instant previews right in the canvas. Track every step of your agent's flow.

Jump to Editor

Jump from any step in the workflow directly into the editor to make tweaks and polish.

Chat

Chat lets you talk with an AI and edit your videos in natural language. The AI understands your video, so you can ask it to perform edits based on what it sees and hears.

Edit & Analyze

Prompt and apply edits directly through chat. From simple text overlays to AI asset generations, all through natural language.

Multimodal

The AI can see and hear your video, allowing for natural conversations about anything in or out of frame, including visual elements, audio, and timing.

Timeline Context

AI Chat has context of your video timeline and can edit timeline elements directly. It can also correct itself if it makes a mistake.

Drag & Drop

Generate AI audio, image, and video assets and drag them directly into your timeline.

MOSAIC
